user.title: Bosch eBike Setup
user.description: Enter the Client-ID from your Bosch eBike Portal app registration at portal.bosch-ebike.com/data-act/app

auth_code.title: Bosch Login
auth_code.description:
1. Open this link in your browser: [{authorize_url}]({authorize_url})
2. Log in with your Bosch SingleKey ID
3. After login the browser is redirected to `http://localhost:8888/callback?code=...`. The browser will show an error (no server is listening) — that's expected.
4. Copy the **entire URL** from the address bar (or just the value after `code=`) and paste it below — both work.

error.token_error: Token exchange failed. Please try again.

abort.no_callback: No callback received from Bosch login.
abort.token_error: Token exchange failed. Please try again.
